title: Sapthamashree Thaskaraha
subTitle: Seven men, after getting acquainted in prison and finding out that all of their lives have been affected by the same con man, decide to raid the fraudster's life savings.

title: Venalil Oru Mazha
subTitle: Vasu, a trolley driver, struggles to provide for his poor family. His life takes a turn when he meets with an accident and loses his left hand.

title: Amme Bhagavathi
subTitle: Parvathy, a devotee of Goddess Durga, struggles to run her family. Goddess Durga comes in the form of Parvathy's daughter in order to teach a lesson to all those who trouble Parvathy.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Filler
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Magic Lamp
subTitle: Anupama, a young woman, lies about her love life, which leads to misunderstandings as she tries to run away from her conservative family.

title: Runner
subTitle: Ajay, a fearless Kabaddi player, rescues Swapna from the ruthless Obul Reddy, who is obsessed with marrying her. Subsequently, Ajay stands his ground when he pursues them.

title: Karinkunnam 6's
subTitle: When an unexpected tragedy makes Aby immobile, his volleyball team is acquired by another businessman. However, his wife takes up the challenge of forming a new team in order to fulfil Aby's wish.

title: The King
subTitle: After learning that an elected representative in the parliament is corrupted and involved in many crimes, Alex, an IAS officer, decides to expose his misdeeds in front of the public.

title: Viswasam
subTitle: Thooku Durai, a strong and respected village leader, faces personal struggles as he tries to reunite with his estranged wife Niranjana and daughter, all while confronting challenges from his past.

title: Nirnnayakam
subTitle: Ajay, a student at the National Defense Academy, aids his advocate father in a case and exposes governmental negligence.

title: Ezhamkadalin Akkare
subTitle: Lakshmi, a nursing student, is the daughter of an unemployed man. In order to make ends meet, she goes to New York and works as a nurse.

title: Iniyenkilum
subTitle: A group of labourers decide to act against corrupt government contractors and officials in order to abolish the atrocities they are put through.

title: Njaan
subTitle: Ravi, a critic, comes across the writings of K T N Kottoor. Highly inspired by what he reads, he travels to a village in Kerala in search of the author.

title: Molly Aunty Rocks!
subTitle: Molly returns to being a bank employee in India after spending a long time abroad. However, when she decides to take voluntary retirement, an officer accuses her of committing income tax evasion..

title: Kichamani MBA
subTitle: Kichamani gets people's work done in the government offices through bribery and corruption. However, while doing such dealings, he earns the enmity of Devanarayanan, a shrewd politician.

title: Jersey
subTitle: Arjun, a talented but failed cricketer, decides to return to cricket in his late thirties driven by the desire to represent the Indian cricket team and fulfil his son's wish for a jersey as a gift.

title: Fireman
subTitle: When an LPG tanker crashes, causing a horrific explosion, a valiant fireman steps in to handle the situation, unaware of the foul scheme at play.

title: Double Barrel
subTitle: Pancho and Vinci struggle to make money to buy precious stones from a don. When they attempt to make a crucial deal, complications arise and a large-scale gang war erupts.

title: Double Barrel
subTitle: Pancho and Vinci struggle to make money to buy precious stones from a don. When they attempt to make a crucial deal, complications arise and a large-scale gang war erupts.

title: Love in Singapore
subTitle: Machu an impoverished orphan, becomes successful in his life through hard work and determination. However, when a fraudster dupes him twice, he follows him to Singapore to confront him.

subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Love Story
subTitle: A Christian Zumba instructor falls for a starry-eyed upper caste Hindu girl. In their quest for happiness, they must first overcome a massive caste divide.

title: College Days
subTitle: The lives of a group of young medical students take a sudden turn when one of them kills Ananthu, a classmate, and the entire event gets recorded on camera.

title: Rajavinte Makan
subTitle: With the help of Vincent, a criminal, Krishnadas builds a successful political career. However, things go awry when he double-crosses the gangster, who then vows to exact revenge on him.

title: Sandwich
subTitle: Engineer Sai accidentally kills the brother of a criminal. However, things take an interesting turn after the criminal's rival offers protection to Sai on the condition that he marries his daughter.

title: Aakashamittayee
subTitle: A supportive father encourages his son to chase his dreams, while another forces his own ambitions onto his child. Meanwhile, a third remains indifferent towards his child.

title: Naadody
subTitle: In search of Andrew who had promised him a job, Sachidananda ends up saving a millionaire's granddaughter. This gets him entangled in a series of grave issues.
